goal: inverse_bijection[X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g)) = action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse)
inverse_bijection[X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g)).map(x) = a.act(g.inverse, x)
compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g), action_bijection[G, X](a, h)) = action_bijection[G, X](a, g * h)
action_bijection[G, X](a, g * h).map(x) = a.act(g * h, x)
compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g), action_bijection[G, X](a, h)).map(x) = a.act(g * h, x)
inverse_bijection[X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g)) = action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse)
compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse), action_bijection[G, X](a, g)).map(x) = a.act(g.inverse * g, x)
compose_bijection[X, X, X](inverse_bijection[X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g)), action_bijection[G, X](a, g)).map(x) = x
inverse_bijection[X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g)) = action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse)
compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g), action_bijection[G, X](a, g.inverse)).map(x) = a.act(g * g.inverse, x)

p.c: function[T0: Group](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 }[G](g)

goal: compose_bijection[X, X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g), inverse_bijection[X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g))).map(x) = x
inverse_bijection[X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g)).map(y) = a.act(g.inverse, y)
orbit[G, X](a, x).contains(inverse_bijection[X, X](action_bijection[G, X](a, g)).map(y))
orbit[G, X](a, x) = orbit[G, X](a, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x))
orbit[G, X](a, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x)).contains(action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(y))
orbit[G, X](a, x) = orbit[G, X](a, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x))
orbit[G, X](a, x).contains(a.act(g.inverse, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(y)))
a.act(g.inverse, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(y)) = a.act(g.inverse, a.act(g, y))
orbit[G, X](a, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x)).contains(action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(y))
orbit[G, X](a, x).contains(y) = orbit[G, X](a, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x)).contains(action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(y))
a.act(h * g, x) = a.act(h, a.act(g, x))
a.act(g, x) = a.act(h * g, x) = stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains(g.inverse * (h * g))

p.c: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](g.inverse, h, g)
function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](g.inverse, h, g)

goal: a.act(g, x) = a.act(h * g, x) = stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains(g.inverse * (h * g))
a.act(h * g, x) = a.act(h, a.act(g, x))
stabilizer[G, X](a, a.act(g, x)).contains(h) = stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains(g.inverse * h * g)
stabilizer[G, X](a, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x)).contains(h) = stabilizer[G, X](a, a.act(g, x)).contains(h)
stabilizer[G, X](a, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x)).contains(h) = stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains(g.inverse * h * g)
stabilizer[G, X](a, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x)).contains(h) = fixed_points[G, X](a, h).contains(action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x))
stabilizer[G, X](a, action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x)).contains(h) = stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains(g.inverse * h * g)
stabilizer[G, X](a, x).contains(g.inverse * h * g) = fixed_points[G, X](a, g.inverse * h * g).contains(x)
fixed_points[G, X](a, h).contains(action_bijection[G, X](a, g).map(x)) = fixed_points[G, X](a, g.inverse * h * g).contains(x)

fixed_points[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), h).contains(action_bijection[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), g).map(p)) = fixed_points[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), g.inverse * h * g).contains(p)

fixed_points[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), g.inverse * h * g).contains(p) = (fixed_points[G, X](a, g.inverse * h * g).contains(p.first) and fixed_points[G, Y](b, g.inverse * h * g).contains(p.second))

fixed_points[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), h).contains(action_bijection[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), g).map(p)) = (fixed_points[G, X](a, g.inverse * h * g).contains(p.first) and fixed_points[G, Y](b, g.inverse * h * g).contains(p.second))

stabilizer[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), action_bijection[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), g).map(p)).contains(h) = stabilizer[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), p).contains(g.inverse * h * g)
stabilizer[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), p).contains(g.inverse * h * g) = stabilizer[G, X](a, p.first).intersection(stabilizer[G, Y](b, p.second)).contains(g.inverse * h * g)

stabilizer[G, X](a, p.first).intersection(stabilizer[G, Y](b, p.second)).contains(g.inverse * h * g) = (stabilizer[G, X](a, p.first).contains(g.inverse * h * g) and stabilizer[G, Y](b, p.second).contains(g.inverse * h * g))

stabilizer[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), action_bijection[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), g).map(p)).contains(h) = (stabilizer[G, X](a, p.first).contains(g.inverse * h * g) and stabilizer[G, Y](b, p.second).contains(g.inverse * h * g))
